cycle_id: F113 grade fix + F125 doc-hash-seal MASTER + F23 keep — registry quality_audit_v2 cleanup
scope: surgical cleanup per raw 71 (manual escalate, no auto-retire) + raw 73 (admissibility — non-trivial doc-hash master) + raw 77 (audit-append-only)

axes.name: F113 grade-token fix
axes.claim: atlas entry proof_theoretic_ordinal_ladder = L2:omega < ... < L_ω :: foundations [11*PASS_LITERATURE]
axes.before: regex truncated at `Feferman-Schutte\)` — Levels L10/L11/L_ω AND `:: foundations [11*PASS_LITERATURE]` grade token never validated
axes.after: regex extended through `L10:psi(Omega_omega) (Bachmann-Howard) < L11:omega_1^CK (Church-Kleene) < L_. :: foundations [11*PASS_LITERATURE]` — full 8-level ladder + grade token now anchored
axes.rationale: raw 73 admissibility — without grade-token anchor, atlas could downgrade [11*PASS_LITERATURE] → [10*PRESUMED] silently and F113 would still GREEN. Fix closes the semantic gap noted in quality_audit_v2.

axes.name: F6/F7/F8 NXS-002 trio — F125 MASTER doc-hash-seal added (raw 73 OPT-C)
axes.decision: OPT-C — ADD F125 MASTER doc-hash-seal, KEEP F6/F7/F8 facet anchors (orthogonal coverage, no replacement)

alternatives_considered.OPT-A_keep_3: defense-in-depth via marker overlap, but cannot detect non-marker edits (footer, methodology, citations)
alternatives_considered.OPT-B_consolidate: would lose facet-specific anchor semantics — drift in just QRNG paragraph would only show as 'doc changed' without pointing at WHICH marker
alternatives_considered.OPT-C_master_plus_facets: PICKED — F125 sha256-seals byte stream; F6/F7/F8 retain marker-specific failure semantics (raw 73 + raw 77 audit-append-only friendly)

axes.verification: PASS — replayed F125 cmd → ABSTRACTION_CEILING_HASH_INTACT (matches doc current hash)
axes.non_trivial_proof: byte-stream sha256 detects edits invisible to all 3 marker greps (e.g. citation update, footer revision, paragraph reordering that preserves the 3 markers); raw 73 admissibility satisfied

axes.name: F23 atlas-DSL Layer4 vacuous regression — KEEP decision
axes.current_status: NON_EMPTY (PASS — Layer 4 still vacuous, but regression detector remains green; sha != e3b0c44298fc1c14 of empty string check evaluates to NON_EMPTY branch)
axes.decision: OPT-A — KEEP F23 active (per raw 71 conservative default, no auto-retire)
axes.rationale: the regression F23 guards against (Layer 4 reverting to vacuous PASS via empty-sha) is real: if the v2 serializer or shard subset implementation regresses, F23 fires. Quality_audit_v2 flagged it as 'narrow once-fixed catch, low value' but raw 71 mandates manual escalate — automatic retire would shed regression coverage with zero replacement.

alternatives_considered.OPT-A_keep: PICKED — preserves regression coverage; cost = 1 entry in registry runs
alternatives_considered.OPT-B_soft_retire: would add `retired: true`, exclude from active runs; rejected because raw 71 prefers status-quo when in doubt
alternatives_considered.OPT-C_generalize: Layer 4 vacuous-PASS for ANY shard (not just chip-p5-2); deferred to future hardening ω-cycle — adding scope now mixes concerns

raw_compliance.raw_71_manual_escalate: F23 keep + F113 patch + F125 add all manually applied; no auto-retire
raw_compliance.raw_73_structural_admissibility: F125 doc-hash check is non-trivial (catches non-marker edits invisible to F6/F7/F8); F113 grade-token anchor closes downgrade-silent gap
raw_compliance.raw_77_audit_append_only: F125 appended after F114 (registry order preserved); F113 in-place mutation tracked via cmd_sha256 delta + this witness
raw_compliance.raw_66_ai_native_error: F125 reason+fix trailer documents recompute path (sha256 + cmd hex constant + cmd_sha256) for intentional edits

next_cycles: F23 OPT-C generalization: rewrite as 'Layer 4 vacuous-PASS detector for ANY shard' — broaden coverage scope
atlas_dsl_v2_serializer ascii-type-alphabet extension (root-cause fix for F23's HIT condition; would convert F23 from regression-guard to redundant)
auto-spawn cmd template hardening: include grade-token anchor by default (F113 manual fix shows the pattern; eliminate PRESENCE-only weakness ecosystem-wide)
fixpoint_marker: F113 grade-anchored, F125 master doc-hash-seal added with orthogonal coverage to F6/F7/F8 trio, F23 conservatively kept per raw 71. Registry 104→105 active (+1 F125, 0 retired). All 3 cleanup_v2 axes resolved with raw 71/73/77 compliance.
